headline: J.P. Morgan Turns More Positive on Tesla as Robotics and AI Shape Future Outlook (TSLA)
summary: J. P. Morgan has upgraded Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to “neutral” from “underweight”, arguing that the company’s market valuation is becoming increasingly tied to its long-term ambitions in autonomous technology and robotics rather than its near-term financial performance.

headline: How The Cheniere Energy (LNG) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: The latest fair value estimate for Cheniere Energy has been trimmed slightly from US$303.00 to about US$302.55, a move of less than 1% that keeps the core valuation view largely in place. That small adjustment comes as analysts balance bullish arguments around U.S. LNG demand and cash returns with more cautious takes on revenue growth, margins, and execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these competing views are shaping the current story around the stock and how to follow the...
